title: B.Sc (Hons) Biotechnology
content: The B.Sc. (Hons) Biotechnology program is an interdisciplinary undergraduate course designed to provide students with a comprehensive foundation in biotechnology. Combining principles from biology, chemistry, and engineering, the program equips students with the knowledge and technical skills necessary for success in the rapidly evolving biotechnology sector. The curriculum includes specialized electives and advanced topics, allowing students to tailor their education to specific interests such as medical biotechnology, environmental biotechnology, and Industrial biotechnology. Graduates are well-prepared for a variety of career paths in research, healthcare, agriculture, and industry, as well as for further studies in advanced degree programs. This program not only imparts theoretical knowledge but also emphasizes real-world applications, preparing students to address contemporary challenges and contribute to innovations in biotechnology. XIIth with Physics Chemistry & Biology with 50% marks The minimum age for admission shall be 17 years Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Biotechnology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science (PCB) with minimum 50% marks. 01 The B.Sc. (Hons) Biotechnology program is designed to cultivate a strong academic and technical foundation in biotechnology by integrating the principles of biology, chemistry, and technology. 02 It aims to develop competent graduates with critical thinking, analytical skills, and hands-on expertise to meet the growing demands of the biotechnology sector. 03 The program prepares students for successful careers in industry, healthcare, agriculture, and research, and equips them to pursue advanced studies and contribute meaningfully to scientific and technological advancements in life sciences. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 Graduates shall learn and apply knowledge to conduct research in biotechnology and interdisciplinary fields efficiently and ethically. 02 Graduates of biotechnology shall excel in higher studies and will exhibit competitive caliber to make a successful career in industries and interdisciplinary research. 01 Technical Proficiency in Biotechnology: Graduates will be proficient in using modern biotechnological techniques and tools to design, conduct, analyze, and interpret experiments in areas such as molecular biology, genetics, bioinformatics, and bioprocess engineering. 02 Application of Biotechnology in Industry and Healthcare: Graduates will be able to apply biotechnological principles and practices to develop sustainable solutions in various industries, including healthcare, agriculture, environment, and pharmaceuticals, addressing societal and environmental challenges. XIIth with Physics Chemistry & Biology with 50% marks The minimum age for admission shall be 17 years Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 2) XII with Science (PCB) with minimum 50% marks.
